# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind AI Assistant: More Guided Help, Smarter Hints
- Summary: Showcase how the Azure OpenAI-powered assistant guides users through challenging DSA problems with contextual hints and iterative feedback, integrated into the live CodeGrind editor.
- Slug: codegrind-ai-assistant-expansion
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-ai-assistant-expansion
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-06-25-codegrind-ai-assistant-expansion.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now expands AI-assisted problem solving with multi-model support and enhanced guidance. Users get real-time, context-aware hints and code-completion ideas within the editor, improving learning flow without sacrificing challenge.
- CTA: Try the new AI-assisted problems in CodeGrind and share your experience with the community.
- Visual brief: A short, 15-20 second demo video: screen recording of the CodeGrind editor showing a LeetCode-style problem, the AI assistant panel offering hints, iterative user edits, and a successful run. Include subtle cyberpunk UI accents and CodeGrind branding.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
